scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build: cd server && rm -rf dist && npx prisma generate && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.start: cd server && npx prisma db push --skip-generate --accept-data-loss && node dist/index.js
scripts.db:push: cd server && npx prisma db push
scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
